overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic castle interior (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring stone corridors, grand staircases, and magical artifact displays. The player walks through hallways, examines decorative objects in display cases, and encounters other student NPCs in wizard robes.

events.description: approaching a large blue and white porcelain vase in an ornate display case
stopping to examine the vase closely before turning away

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor and examining a decorative vase in a display case

entered.detail: stone wall with arched niches containing knight statues
large blue and white decorative vase in a dark wooden display case with spiral columns
intricately carved stone balustrade with gothic patterns

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an upper corridor of a gothic castle, passing wall niches containing knight statues. The camera approaches and examines a large blue and white porcelain vase displayed in an ornate wooden case before turning away.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with double staircase

events.description: turning from the narrow corridor to overlook the grand hall with chandelier
descending the main staircase into the foyer area

agents.ego_description: turning from the corridor to overlook the grand hall, then descending the main staircase into the foyer

notable_agents.action: two students in wizard robes sitting on a bench against the wall

entered.detail: large ornate chandelier hanging from the high ceiling
twin stone staircases descending to the ground floor
intricate circular patterned inlay in the marble floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand hall with high ceilings and a large chandelier. The player descends a double staircase into the foyer, passing a circular floor mosaic. Two students in wizard robes sit on a bench against the wall.

events.description: approaching and examining a large ironbound wooden door
moving to examine a mechanical bird automaton on display

agents.ego_description: walking across the foyer floor, examining a large wooden door and a mechanical bird automaton in a display case

entered.detail: mechanical bird-like creature with outstretched wings on a circular pedestal
tall golden ornate object resembling an hourglass in a dark wooden case
full suit of medieval armor standing against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player explores the ground floor foyer, walking past a large ironbound wooden door and examining a mechanical bird automaton on a pedestal. The circular floor mosaic remains visible as the camera moves toward a display case containing a golden hourglass.

events.description: approaching a display of three large hanging bells
two student NPCs come into view talking in front of the bell display

agents.ego_description: walking along the hallway and observing two students conversing in front of a display of three large bells

notable_agents.action: two students in wizard robes talking to each other in front of the bell display

entered.detail: three large bronze bells suspended in an ornate wooden frame against a green backdrop
dark wooden bench with carved details

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a hallway featuring a display of three large hanging bells mounted in a wooden frame. Two students in wizard robes stand talking in front of the display before one walks away. A wooden bench sits against the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with tribal mask and skull displays

events.description: following a student up the stone staircase
examining a tribal mask display in a tall wooden case

agents.ego_description: following another student up the stairs, then examining displays containing a tribal mask and a skull wearing a nightcap

notable_agents.action: student in wizard robes walking up the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: large wooden tribal mask with a beard displayed in a tall dark case with spiral columns
human skull wearing a blue nightcap resting on a red pillow in a glass case with twisted columns

segments.scene_description: The player follows a student up a staircase to an upper corridor. The camera examines a display containing a large tribal mask, then moves to another display case holding a skull wearing a blue nightcap on a red velvet pillow.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper entrance hall with weapon displays

events.description: reaching the upper hallway with crossed weapons display

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper hall and ascending another staircase to reach a hallway with crossed weapons displayed on the wall

entered.detail: display case containing crossed axes or polearms mounted on the wall
elevated walkway with stone railings overlooking the lower level

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the upper hall, passing large wooden doors and ascending another grand staircase. The scene transitions to an upper hallway featuring a display case with crossed weapons mounted on the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet upper corridor into the expansive, artifact-filled grandeur of a castle foyer. It begins by gliding past knight statues in wall niches, pausing briefly to examine a blue and white porcelain vase within an ornate wooden case. As the camera turns away, the space opens into a grand hall with high ceilings and a massive chandelier, leading the viewer down a double staircase and past students in wizard robes resting on a bench. The scene then shifts to the ground floor, moving across a circular floor mosaic and past a heavy ironbound door to inspect a mechanical bird automaton on a pedestal. Finally, the movement continues across the foyer toward a display case housing a golden hourglass.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gothic castle interior, moving from a grounded hallway into the elevated reaches of the upper corridors. It begins in a corridor featuring a wooden bench and a display of three large hanging bells, where two students in wizard robes are seen talking before one departs. As the camera follows a student up a staircase, the environment shifts to an upper level where the view lingers on a tribal mask and a skull wearing a blue nightcap resting on a red velvet pillow. The scene then expands through the upper hall past large wooden doors, ascending another grand staircase to reach a final gallery. The movement concludes in a high hallway, passing a display of crossed weapons mounted against the stone wall.
